backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and CRUD operations for customers, service orders, user profiles, and admin QR settings, with role-based access control via included mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs for tracking build requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vijay Online Centre app, loading Poppins and Noto Sans Devanagari fonts and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component implementing a screen-based state machine for navigation across splash, login, customer, and admin screens, using AuthContext to persist and restore sessions.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component displaying order stats and a tabbed order list with per-order status update buttons, Base64 attachment viewing, and friendly error messages that avoid re-login language.
frontend/src/components/AdminLogin.tsx: Renders a secure admin login form with user ID and password fields, using the AuthContext's adminLogin method to authenticate and calling onSuccess or displaying an error on result.
frontend/src/components/AdminQRManagemen: Admin-only panel for managing payment QR codes, allowing upload of a permanent QR image and setting an auto-amount via tabs, backed by React Query hooks for fetching and saving QR settings.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Displays contact information for Vijay Online Centre including a helpline number, WhatsApp chat link, direct call link, and Google Maps location link.
frontend/src/components/CustomerLogin.ts: Provides customer authentication UI supporting manual login, registration, and OTP-based login modes, using React Query mutations and storing the session via AuthContext on success.
frontend/src/components/Home.tsx: Renders the home screen with a personalized welcome header, quick-action navigation buttons for key app sections, and a highlights strip showcasing platform features.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell component providing a top bar with logo/logout and bottom navigation tabs that differ between admin and customer roles, wrapping page content and including the VijayAIChatbot.
frontend/src/components/LoginSelection.t: Landing screen that presents two login options—Customer and Admin—with branded header, routing the user to the appropriate login flow on selection.
frontend/src/components/MyOrders.tsx: Customer-facing orders list page that fetches and displays all orders for the logged-in customer, sorted newest-first, with color-coded status badges and navigation to order detail or receipt views.
frontend/src/components/OrderTracking.ts: Order detail/tracking page that fetches a single order by ID and renders a step-by-step progress indicator or a rejection notice, along with order metadata and attachments.
frontend/src/components/PaymentScreen.ts: Payment page for a given order that displays a UPI QR code—either a stored permanent QR image from settings or a canvas-generated placeholder—along with service and order information.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Printable receipt view that fetches order details by ID and renders a formatted receipt card showing order metadata, amount, status progress, and any attachments.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCatalog.t: Displays a searchable, categorized list of all available services, allowing users to select a service which triggers the onSelectService callback.
frontend/src/components/ServiceForm.tsx: Renders a service application form with fields for name, mobile, address, and file uploads, submitting the order via a mutation hook and showing a success screen with the order ID on completion.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Displays an animated splash/loading screen with the app logo, name, and Hindi welcome text for 2.5 seconds before calling onComplete.
frontend/src/components/VijayAIChatbot.t: A floating chatbot widget that accepts user text input, matches it against predefined responses via getBotResponse, and displays a bilingual (Hindi/English) conversation panel.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides a React context managing both admin and customer authentication sessions, persisting state to localStorage and exposing login/logout methods for each role.
frontend/src/data/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines a list of keyword-to-response mappings for the Vijay AI chatbot and exports a getBotResponse function that returns a bilingual reply based on matched keywords in the user's message.
frontend/src/data/services.ts: Defines a Service interface and exports an array of 32 government/utility services (certificates, ID cards, pensions, etc.) with id, name, category, icon, and description fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated actor (with admin token initialization) or an anonymous one, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including customer registration/login, order CRUD operations, and admin QR settings, wrapping the ICP actor calls with caching and mutation logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS that defines a navy blue and silver theme with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes, plus utility component classes like navy-gradient, card-navy, and btn-primary-navy.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Defines an ExternalBlob utility class that wraps binary data or URLs, supporting creation from bytes or URL, progress callbacks, and methods to retrieve a direct object URL or raw bytes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, silver, gold, oklch-based semantic tokens), fonts (Poppins, Noto Sans Devanagari), border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations using typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for the Caffeine AI shop management app, documenting version, architectural notes, known issues (auth errors, form failures, photo retrieval, broken buttons), and existing feature fix requests with requirement IDs.
